title: Internal error when task is used to assign subscripted vector
body:
---


Author Name: **Al Grant**
Original Redmine Issue: 1387 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

```
task T;
  output s;
  assign s = 1'b0;
endtask

module #^A(output a[2:0]);
  integer i = 1;
  initial begin
     T(a[i]);
  end
endmodule

```
fails with
```
%Error: Internal Error: bugs/#^A.sv:10: ../V3AstNodes.cpp:764: Can't find current statement to addBeforeStmt

```
Strangely, this is sensitive to the vector size, and (for me) it stops happening if the '2' is changed to '3'. That might suggest sensitivity to uninitialized data but valgrind isn't showing anything.
